creator: steve@stephen-fisher.com
text:
The URL for the BRU backup software listed under "Enhanced Software Technologies" is out-of-date.  BRU seems to have been moved over to a new company called TOLIS Group at http://www.tolisgroup.com/ at some point over the years.  The old domain name, estinc.com, now brings up a squatter page.

One caveat though: It's hard to find the fact that they support FreeBSD at all on their web-site.  I don't know to what extent they do these days like they did back in the 90s.  Maybe that link should be removed entirely.
